context: Tests whether the agent catches AccessorySetupKit descriptor and property-list failure modes instead of treating descriptors as ordinary optional filters.

checklist.name: SSID exclusivity
checklist.description: Flags setting both ssid and ssidPrefix on the same descriptor as invalid or crash-prone and recommends using exactly one.

checklist.name: WiFi support
checklist.description: States that Wi-Fi discovery requires WiFi in NSAccessorySetupSupports.

checklist.name: BLE identifier
checklist.description: States that a Bluetooth descriptor needs bluetoothCompanyIdentifier or bluetoothServiceUUID.

checklist.name: Manufacturer dependency
checklist.description: States that manufacturer data blob and mask require a Bluetooth company identifier.

checklist.name: Mask length
checklist.description: Flags that the manufacturer data blob and mask must be provided together and have the same length.

checklist.name: Company plist
checklist.description: Includes NSAccessorySetupBluetoothCompanyIdentifiers in property list guidance for company-identifier-based discovery.

checklist.name: Plist alignment
checklist.description: States that Bluetooth names, services, or company identifiers used in descriptors must be declared in Info.plist.

checklist.name: Crash scope
checklist.description: Connects undeclared Bluetooth discovery values or invalid Wi-Fi descriptor configuration to AccessorySetupKit discovery-time crashes or invalid requests.

checklist.name: Corrected snippets
checklist.description: Provides corrected Swift snippets for both Wi-Fi and BLE descriptors.

checklist.name: No broad tutorial
checklist.description: Keeps the review focused on AccessorySetupKit setup rather than explaining general CoreBluetooth or Wi-Fi networking concepts.
